text:
GG0170D3 Discharge Performance Sit to Stand Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to safely come to a standing position from sitting in a chair or on the side of the bed at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability to safely come to a standing position from sitting in a chair or on the side of the bed at the time of discharge. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision
